scripts.deps:demo: (npm --prefix vendor/demo ci || npm --prefix vendor/demo install) && node scripts/ensure-demo-msw.cjs
scripts.build:demo: VITE_BUILD_BASE=/demo/ VITE_ROUTER_BASENAME=/demo VITE_DEMO_MSW_MODE=partial npm --prefix vendor/demo run build
scripts.build: npm run check:demo-parity:warn && npm run deps:demo && npm run deps:crucible && npm run build:demo && npm run build:crucible && astro build && node scripts/copy-demo.cjs && node scripts/copy-crucible.cjs
scripts.anti-slop:deps: depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs src scripts netlify/functions crucible/src vendor/demo/src demo-overrides
scripts.anti-slop:cycles: npm run anti-slop:cycles:root && npm run anti-slop:cycles:crucible && npm run anti-slop:cycles:demo
scripts.anti-slop:unused: npm run anti-slop:unused:root && npm run anti-slop:unused:crucible && npm run anti-slop:unused:demo
scripts.anti-slop:duplicates: jscpd --config .jscpd.json src scripts netlify/functions crucible/src vendor/demo/src demo-overrides
scripts.anti-slop:site: depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs src scripts netlify/functions demo-overrides && npm run anti-slop:cycles:root && jscpd --config .jscpd.json src scripts netlify/functions demo-overrides && npm run anti-slop:unused:root
scripts.anti-slop:crucible: depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs crucible/src && npm run anti-slop:cycles:crucible && jscpd --config .jscpd.json crucible/src && npm run anti-slop:unused:crucible
scripts.anti-slop:demo: depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs vendor/demo/src && npm run anti-slop:cycles:demo && jscpd --config .jscpd.json vendor/demo/src && npm run anti-slop:unused:demo
scripts.anti-slop: npm run anti-slop:deps && npm run anti-slop:cycles && npm run anti-slop:duplicates && npm run anti-slop:unused
